name: Bow Man
short_description: All you have to do is kill the monsters. Try to kill as many monsters as possible to make the highest score possible.
detailed_description:
This game is an arcade. All you have to do is kill the monsters. Try to kill as many monsters as possible to make the highest score possible. Good luck and fun.

Peculiarities:
- Nice graphics
- Levels with increasing difficulty
about_the_game:
